ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Peter Machi to appear on October 31, 2012 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Mr. Machi appeared after the matter had been called and presented an endorsed copy of the Petition for Final Distribution with a hearing date of November 13, 2012. Today's status hearing is now off calendar and the Order to Appear will not be issued.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Machi for Petitioner.

The accounting petition was continued to January 4, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the Inventory and Appraisal and for Mr. Machi to address the issues raised in the Examiner's notes two weeks prior to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Machi for Joanne Kennedy.

Mr. Machi stated that he submitted the request for appointment of a Probate Referee. The accounting petition was continued to November 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Aguerre.
